meaning: v.(使)显得新鲜,(使)精神饱满,(使)减少咸味
examples: I'll just go and freshen up before supper.
My room needed a coat of paint to freshen it up.
They realized that in order to reach customers they had to freshen up their act.
Certain houseplants can truly freshen the air, removing up to 90% of the toxins from a room.
